clusters.title: Boy, 16, charged with murder after police discover body of 13-year-old Layla Jeffery in Victorian bushland
clusters.neutral_headline: Teenage boy charged with murder of Victorian girl Layla Jeffery
bullet_summary: The boy has been charged with one count of murder, detectives from Victoria’s missing persons squad said on Saturday evening
The town of Donald in Victoria's west is in mourning, after remains believed to be missing 13-year-old Layla Jeffery were found by police on Thursday

items.title: Boy, 16, charged with murder after police discover body of 13-year-old Layla Jeffery in Victorian bushland
items.standfirst: Police said the teenage boy was known to both Layla and the policeGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA 16-year-old boy has been charged with murder following the discovery of human remains during a search for a missing teenage girl in regional Victoria.The boy has been charged with one count of murder, detectives from Victoria’s missing persons squad said on Saturday evening.
